name: Yue Li
title: Postdoctoral Research Fellow
tagline: Using AI to tackle the complex problems of low-dimensional materials.
bio: Hi! I'm Yue Li (李越). I am a postdoctoral research fellow at Nanyang Technological University, working with Prof. Zheng Liu. I obtained my Ph.D. in Physics from Peking University, advised by Prof. Jin Zhang and Prof. Ziqiang Zhao.

My research uses AI to tackle the complex problems of low-dimensional materials, from carbon nanotubes to graphene and other 2D systems. I develop ML models and automation frameworks that run from holistic design, through experimentation, to mechanism extraction.

Lately I'm interested in loop engineering for science agents, letting an agent correct itself through trial and error, so that over time it builds up something like a human expert's accumulated intuition.
The longer vision: a materials-research process compiled like a program, so that new science can emerge from it.
